mapper.select: /* SQL ID : AsmtProfIndivDAO.indivSbmsnTrgtList 설 명 : 개별 과제 제출 대상 목록 */ SELECT TRGT.ASMT_ID , TRGT.USER_ID , USR.USERNM , USR.STDNT_NO , DEPT.DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN_TRGT TRGT JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON USR.USER_ID = TRGT.USER_ID AND USR.USER_STSCD = 'ACTV' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON DEPT.DEPT_ID = USR.DEPT_ID WHERE TRGT.ASMT_ID = #{asmtId} AND TRGT.USER_ID IS NOT NULL AND TRGT.TEAM_ID IS NULL ORDER BY USR.USERNM
